props.name: ariaLive
props.description: Indicates how assistive technology should handle updates to the live region.

props.name: emphasis
props.description: Sets the visual prominence. 'high' for full background, 'medium' for subtle, 'low' for minimal.

props.name: heading
props.description: Callout heading text.

props.name: iconTheme
props.description: Sets the icon theme. 'outline' for stroked icons, 'filled' for solid icons.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the callout.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the callout. 'medium' has reduced padding and type size for compact areas.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: type
props.description: Sets the context and colour of the callout.
